description: Source of truth for AI Lab listing. Notes are primary; slides and demos optional.

notes.title: Tokenize
notes.summary: Split text into tokens and map them to IDs — machines read numbers, not words. BPE vs WordPiece.

notes.title: Embedding
notes.summary: Turn IDs into vectors: similar meaning → nearby points, measured with cosine similarity.

notes.title: Attention
notes.summary: Each word decides which other words to attend to — the Q·K·V mechanism behind Transformers.

notes.title: Softmax
notes.summary: Turn raw scores into probabilities that sum to 1.

notes.title: Classification
notes.summary: Assign a label to input — the most common model-building task, right after softmax.

notes.title: Train with PyTorch
notes.summary: Epoch loop: forward → loss → backward → step. Train a classifier by hand.

notes.title: Train with TensorFlow / Keras
notes.summary: compile + fit: declare the model, let Keras run the epoch loop.

notes.title: Hugging Face — dataset + Space
notes.summary: GitHub for AI: Datasets + pretrained Models + Spaces → a usable model fast.

notes.title: Kaggle — dataset + GPU notebook
notes.summary: Dataset library + free GPU/TPU notebooks + competitions to practice.

notes.title: Transformer — core LLM architecture
notes.summary: Stack attention blocks + positional encoding; encoder (BERT) / decoder (GPT).

notes.title: sentence-transformers — sentence embeddings
notes.summary: Sentence → vector in a few lines; classification and similarity made fast and simple.

notes.title: RAG
notes.summary: Retrieve relevant documents first, then let the model compose a grounded answer with citations.

notes.title: Vector database
notes.summary: Store vectors and find top-k nearest neighbors (ANN). Infrastructure for RAG and semantic search.

notes.title: Semantic search — hybrid · tiered · fallback
notes.summary: Search by meaning: combine inverted index (Elastic) + semantic index (embeddings). My hands-on RAG learning project.

notes.title: MCP
notes.summary: Common standard for agents to call external tools — USB-C for AI. Host ↔ server ↔ tools with schema.

notes.title: Skills · Rules · Commands
notes.summary: Agent know-how: SKILL.md, rules, commands; global ~/.agents.

notes.title: Train · PyTorch / TensorFlow · GPU
notes.summary: HF/Kaggle datasets, PyTorch and TensorFlow, GPU notebooks, train → inference.

notes.title: Car NN — sensor to action
notes.summary: 3 sensors → fully connected network → forward / back / left / right. A visible classification example.

notes.title: Sentiment & complexity routing
notes.summary: Read a sentence and label it: sentiment (neg/neu/pos) and easy/hard routing.

notes.title: Train → Inference
notes.summary: Two lives of a model: learn weights once (train), then use lightly many times (infer).

notes.title: AI Agents · harness comparison
notes.summary: Harness ≠ model: Cursor, Claude Code, Pi, Cline/Kilo, OpenCode, Zed.

notes.title: Model field notes
notes.summary: Model ≠ harness: Grok 4.5, Composer, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi/GLM.

notes.title: Agent automation — OpenClaw · Hermess
notes.summary: Story arc: OpenClaw (pi harness) opened the feel of agent control → Hermess polished it.

notes.title: AI timeline — my journey
notes.summary: Journey from 2023 (first LLM exposure) → embedding… → agents → automation, anchored to real AI milestones.

notes.title: Personal Knowledge-base — videos · docs · GitHub
notes.summary: Separate repo ~/work-station/personal-kb: FTS search + Graph RAG keywords. Submodule planned.
